caption: A man wearing a tall, spiked, silver-grey wig, glasses, and black over-ear headphones sits in a studio. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bow tie. He is positioned behind a black professional microphone and is speaking, with his facial expressions and mouth movements shifting slightly across the sequence. To his left and right, logos for "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" are visible on the screen. The background is a cluttered room featuring several framed photographs on the wall, a mannequin wearing a black garment, and clothing items including a yellow shirt with "LEE" printed on it. As the sequence progresses, the man continues to speak, maintaining his posture while his expression evolves from a neutral look to a more active speaking pose.
